title: Plant Based Chinese Fish Shui Zhu Yu
description: A nutty and flaky post-workout Chinese dish featuring white flour, made plant-based friendly and served in a stone bowl, inspired by the traditional Shui Zhu Yu recipe.
instructions: Cut the tofu into small pieces and set aside.
In a large bowl, whisk together the white flour and cornstarch.
Add the vegetable oil, soy sauce, rice vinegar, and sesame oil to the bowl and stir until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into small pieces and roll each piece into a thin sheet.
Place a few pieces of tofu in the center of each sheet and fold the dough over to form a triangle.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and cook the triangles for 3-4 minutes on each side.
Serve the triangles in a stone bowl with chopped scallions and your choice of dipping sauce.
